Header.Name: cst - triBlanketPurchaseOrder - Synchronous - Permanent Save Validation
Header.Description: Permanent Save Validation modified to get Current Fiscal Year Obligation Total every time saved. This is done here incase SA contract is removed or added.

Task.TaskLabel: Set User Message section to Visible for triBlanketPurchaseOrder
Task.Description: To set the Attention section visible in all tabs

To update the status and previous status in temp record from permanent record (since the status labels are changed on click on the action and we are not commiting the action we need to update the same)

Task.TaskLabel: Call WF Current FY Obligation Total

Task.Description: To set the User Message in the temp record

Task.FilterBo: triContract - Synchronous - Module level business rules

ObjMapping.FldVal: Please update the Contacts section to include a Portfolio Manager.

Task.FilterBo: cst - triBlanketPurchaseOrder - Synchronous - Map Geography - cstServiceAgreement
cst - triBlanketPurcahseOrder - ServiceAgreement Get Planned Exp Date

Task.Description: To set the Attention section not visible in all tabs
